languages.text: {n}Ярость 32-го меровского столкнулась с безжалостной кровожадностью ксеносов. Стрельба и вопли боли эхом раздавались по всему Заркову, блуждая в корневой системе мира. Сотни и тысячи солдат так никогда и не будут найдены, и их имена будут вырезаны на корнях вокруг поселений. И все-таки израненные, опустошенные, меровцы одолели врага.{/n}

{n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Gunfire and cries of pain echoed all across Zarkov, travelling through the root system of the world. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ярость 32-го меровского столкнулась с безжалостной кровожадностью ксеносов. Стрельба и вопли боли эхом раздавались по всему Заркову, блуждая в корневой системе мира. Сотни и тысячи солдат так никогда и не будут найдены, и их имена будут вырезаны на корнях вокруг поселений. И все-таки израненные, опустошенные, меровцы одолели врага.{/n}

Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}

languages.text: {n}32番メロフ連隊の怒りは、異星人の冷酷な血の渇望と激突した。銃声と悲鳴がザルコフ全体に響き渡り、世界の根系を伝って行った。何百、何千という兵士は二度と見つからないだろう。彼らの名は、集落の根に刻まれるだろう。それでも、傷ついた、壊されたメロヴィアンは敵を圧倒した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Gunfire and cries of pain echoed all across Zarkov, travelling through the root system of the world. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 32番メロフ連隊の怒りは、異星人の冷酷な血の渇望と激突した。銃声と悲鳴がザルコフ全体に響き渡り、世界の根系を伝って行った。何百、何千という兵士は二度と見つからないだろう。彼らの名は、集落の根に刻まれるだろう。それでも、傷ついた、壊されたメロヴィアンは敵を圧倒した。

languages.text: {n}La furia del 32.º regimiento de Merov chocó con la despiadada sed de sangre de los xenos. Por todo el sistema de raíces de Zarkov resonaron los disparos y los gritos de dolor. Millares de soldados nunca aparecerán y sus nombres quedarán tallados en las raíces que rodean los asentamientos. Sin embargo, los heridos y maltrechos merovianos lograron derrotar al enemigo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Gunfire and cries of pain echoed all across Zarkov, travelling through the root system of the world. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La furia del 32.º regimiento de Merov chocó con la despiadada sed de sangre de los xenos. Por todo el sistema de raíces de Zarkov resonaron los disparos y los gritos de dolor. Millares de soldados nunca aparecerán y sus nombres quedarán tallados en las raíces que rodean los asentamientos. Sin embargo, los heridos y maltrechos merovianos lograron derrotar al enemigo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫第32团的怒火，与异形无情的嗜血本能正面相撞。枪炮声与哀嚎响彻扎尔科夫，经由根系传遍整个行星。成千上万的将士就此尸骨无存，只剩下一个个名字，刻在定居点周围的根系上。尽管如此，伤痕累累、几近崩溃的梅罗夫人还是战胜了敌人。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Gunfire and cries of pain echoed all across Zarkov, travelling through the root system of the world. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫第32团的怒火，与异形无情的嗜血本能正面相撞。枪炮声与哀嚎响彻扎尔科夫，经由根系传遍整个行星。成千上万的将士就此尸骨无存，只剩下一个个名字，刻在定居点周围的根系上。尽管如此，伤痕累累、几近崩溃的梅罗夫人还是战胜了敌人。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Wut des 32. Merov-Regiments prallte auf die unerbittliche Mordlust der Xenos. Auf ganz Zarkov hallten Schüsse und Schmerzensschreie wider, deren Echo sich einen Weg durch das Wurzelsystem der Welt bahnte. Tausende von Soldaten werden nie gefunden werden, und ihre Namen werden in die Wurzeln im Umfeld der Ansiedlungen graviert. Und doch zwangen die verwundeten, am Boden zerstörten Merovianer den Feind in die Knie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Gunfire and cries of pain echoed all across Zarkov, travelling through the root system of the world. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}

Tausende von Soldaten werden nie gefunden werden, und ihre Namen werden in die Wurzeln im Umfeld der Ansiedlungen graviert. Und doch zwangen die verwundeten, am Boden zerstörten Merovianer den Feind in die Knie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}32. Merov Alayı'nın öfkesi, zenoların acımasız kan dökme arzusuyla çarpıştı. Silah sesleri ve acı çığlıkları tüm Zarkov'da yankılandı, dünyanın kök sisteminde yayıldı. Yüzlerce, binlerce asker asla bulunamayacak ve isimleri yerleşimlerin etrafındaki köklere kazınacak. Buna rağmen yaralı, harap olmuş Merovlular, düşmanı alt etti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Gunfire and cries of pain echoed all across Zarkov, travelling through the root system of the world. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}32. Merov Alayı'nın öfkesi, zenoların acımasız kan dökme arzusuyla çarpıştı. Silah sesleri ve acı çığlıkları tüm Zarkov'da yankılandı, dünyanın kök sisteminde yayıldı. Yüzlerce, binlerce asker asla bulunamayacak ve isimleri yerleşimlerin etrafındaki köklere kazınacak. Buna rağmen yaralı, harap olmuş Merovlular, düşmanı alt etti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La fureur du 32e régiment de Merov et la soif de sang des impitoyables xénos s'entrechoquèrent brutalement. Les tirs et les cris de douleur résonnèrent aux quatre coins de Zarkov, à travers le système radiculaire de la planète. Des centaines, des milliers de soldats ne seraient jamais retrouvés, et leurs noms seraient gravés sur les racines autour des bastions humains. Malgré tout, les Meroviens blessés et dévastés réussirent à dominer l'ennemi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fury of the 32nd Merov Regiment clashed with the xenos' merciless bloodlust. Hundreds and thousands of soldiers will never be found, and their names will be carved into the roots around the settlements. And still, the wounded, devastated Merovians overpowered the enemy.{/n}
